hooks.description: Initialize IJFW state, emit startup banner with memory summary, register project in global registry.
Save session metrics, write journal entry, emit savings receipt.
Deterministic vague-prompt detector. Injects sharpening context when prompt signals are weak.
Scan about-to-run commands for destructive patterns. Inject confirmation reminders before execution.
Trim tool output noise, capture error signals, emit cleaned output as additionalContext.
Preserve key decisions before context compression. Instructs compaction to retain near-horizon turns and protected signal files.
GEMINI BONUS: First-turn memory injection. Calls ijfw_memory_prelude on turn 1 and injects full project context directly before the model call -- richer than Claude's CLAUDE.md approach.
GEMINI BONUS: Response auto-memorize trigger. Detects decision/pattern signals in model output and queues ijfw_memory_store calls.
Policy enforcement checkpoint before tool selection. Enforces ijfw.toml policy rules.
Post-agent cleanup: flush signal files, update session state.
Relay Gemini notifications to IJFW journal for audit trail.
